stemHtml: The pilot of a multi-crew aircraft experiences chest pain radiating to the left arm. What is true regarding the symptoms and their likely consequences?

options.a: These symptoms indicate angina pectoris, and damage to the heart muscle does not occur.
options.b: These symptoms indicate angina pectoris, also known as a heart attack, and damage to the heart muscle will occur.
options.c: These symptoms indicate a heart attack (myocardial infarction), and damage to the heart muscle may occur depending on the severity and duration.
options.d: These symptoms indicate fatigue and stress with no cardiac involvement.
